ItacPersonItem.Notes: Also among the founders of Accademia degli Umidi in Florence. On Varchi`s life and cultural context, see Umberto Pirotti, Benedetto Varchi e la cultura del suo tempo (Florence, 1971). Varchi mentions lecturing on Aristotle`s Nichomachean Ethics to the Infiammati in his correspondence with Piero Vettori, BL, Add. MS 10273, f. 222.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
